## How to test

<!-- Steps a reviewer can follow to verify. If there's no manual
test (pure refactor, infra change), say so. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `cargo fmt` + `cargo clippy` clean (if Rust changed)
- [ ] Added or updated tests for non-trivial logic
- [ ] No new `any`, no stray `console.log`, no commented-out code
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing behaviour changed
